name: uncluttered
description: Quickly filter through all of the clutter in your gmail inbox
author: Andrew McOlash

scripts.build: npm --prefix react/ install && npm --prefix react/ run build
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d ollama && docker compose up -d classifier && concurrently 'npm --prefix react/ start' 'npm --prefix server/ start'
scripts.deploy: ssh -t nas 'export PATH=\$PATH:/usr/local/bin && cd docker/uncluttered && git pull && docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate'
